# Specs Folder Migration Index

Legacy `.skill` files from this folder were migrated and removed.

Use native skills from `.github/skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md` for discovery and execution.

## Native Skill Locations

| Skill | Native skill file |
|---|---|
| api-endpoint | `.github/skills/api-endpoint/SKILL.md` |
| board-pdf-parsing | `.github/skills/board-pdf-parsing/SKILL.md` |
| court-order-management | `.github/skills/court-order-management/SKILL.md` |
| order-analysis | `.github/skills/order-analysis/SKILL.md` |
| bill-generation | `.github/skills/bill-generation/SKILL.md` |
| user-management | `.github/skills/user-management/SKILL.md` |
| dashboard-analytics | `.github/skills/dashboard-analytics/SKILL.md` |
| frontend-component | `.github/skills/frontend-component/SKILL.md` |
| backend-spec-first | `.github/skills/backend-spec-first/SKILL.md` |
| spec-failure-triage | `.github/skills/spec-failure-triage/SKILL.md` |
| release-readiness-backend | `.github/skills/release-readiness-backend/SKILL.md` |

## Recommended Usage

1. Prefer native skill files under `.github/skills/`.
2. Add all new skills only under `.github/skills/<name>/SKILL.md`.
3. Keep this README as the index for discoverable workspace skills.
